message:
feat(output): add visual regression tests with insta snapshots

Add comprehensive snapshot testing for all output components:
- Banner snapshots (plain, rich, minimal)
- Routes table snapshots (basic, empty, with tags)
- Validation error snapshots (single, multi, nested)
- HTTP error snapshots (401, 404, 422, 500)
- Request logger snapshots (basic, full, error)
- Middleware stack snapshot
- Dependency tree snapshot
- Shutdown progress snapshots
- Test results snapshots (passing, mixed)

22 snapshot tests ensure output formatting stability across changes.
Run `cargo insta review` to update snapshots after intentional changes.

Closes bd-33qj

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -28,6 +28,7 @@ full = ["rich", "rich_rust/full"]
 # For testing
 serial_test = "3.2"
 proptest = "1"
+insta = { version = "1.34", features = ["redactions"] }
 
 [lints]
 workspace = true

@@ -0,0 +1,8 @@
+---
+source: crates/fastapi-output/tests/snapshot_tests.rs
+expression: output
+---
+FastAPI Rust v0.1.0
+High performance, easy to learn, fast to code
+
+Server: http://0.0.0.0:3000

@@ -0,0 +1,11 @@
+---
+source: crates/fastapi-output/tests/snapshot_tests.rs
+expression: output
+---
+FastAPI Rust v1.0.0

+

+Docs:   http://localhost:8000/docs
+ReDoc:  http://localhost:8000/redoc
+OpenAPI: http://localhost:8000/openapi.json

+---
+Dependency Tree
